query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS remaining_duplicates
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi2
  WHERE bi2.invoiceNumber = bi.invoiceNumber
    AND bi2.description = bi.description
    AND bi2.lineAmount = bi.lineAmount
    AND bi2.contactName = bi.contactName
    AND bi2.id != bi.id
);
